questions.question: What would you like to configure?

options.label: Permissions

options.label: Hooks
options.description: Run commands automatically on events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.)

options.label: Environment vars
options.description: Set env variables for Claude Code sessions

options.label: Other settings
options.description: Model, language, theme, cleanup period, MCP servers, etc.

questions.question: Which settings file should this go in?

options.label: User (global)
options.description: ~/.claude/settings.json — applies to all projects (Recommended)

options.label: Project (shared)
options.description: .claude/settings.json — committed, applies to all team members

options.label: Project (local)
options.description: .claude/settings.local.json — gitignored, personal override for this project

questions.question: Which settings file should this go in?

options.label: User (global)
options.description: ~/.claude/settings.json — applies to all projects (Recommended)

options.label: Project (shared)
options.description: .claude/settings.json — committed, applies to all team members

options.label: Project (local)
options.description: .claude/settings.local.json — gitignored, personal override for this project

content.text:
What command or tool do you want to allow? For example:
- `Bash(git:*)` — all git commands
- `Bash(npm run test)` — exact command
- `Edit` — all file edits
- `Bash(docker:*)` — all docker commands
